chapter_title: About the Forbiddance of Boasting and

hadith_entries.text:
889. Narrated Iyadh ibn Hemar; 'Allah's Messenger
said: "Allah has revealed to me that you (people) should be
humble, so that no one transgresses (the rights of) another, or
boasts to the others." (Muslim).

890. Narrated Abu-Huraira; 'The Messenger of Allah *
said: "If the man said; 'People has ruined. He is the ruined
one6."
6 This is confined to the person who says so out of haughtiness,
arrogance, and contempt of people. As to the person who says
Riyadhos-Saliheen (The Meadows of the Righteous)
